message:
Mention fast mode in metadata

Update package, repository, and changelog metadata so searches for fast mode can find the extension.

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # ⚡ pi-service-tier
 
 A [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/tree/main/packages/coding-agent)
-extension that applies provider service tiers.
+extension that toggles fast mode and applies provider service tiers.
 
 ## 📦 Install

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 id: pi-service-tier
 name: Pi Service Tier
-description: A service-tier extension for pi.
+description: A fast-mode and service-tier extension for pi.
 repository: mavam/pi-service-tier

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Fast mode metadata discoverability
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-04-25T19:15:14.089815Z
+---
+
+Package and repository metadata now mention `fast mode`, making the extension easier to find when searching for the `/fast` command or fast-tier controls.

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "pi-service-tier",
   "version": "0.1.0",
-  "description": "Provider service-tier controls for pi",
+  "description": "Fast mode and provider service-tier controls for pi",
   "type": "module",
   "peerDependencies": {
     "@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent": "*",
@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@
     "pi",
     "pi-extension",
     "service-tier",
+    "fast-mode",
+    "fast",
     "openai",
     "codex",
     "footer",
